title: Debug View
body:
# ABOUT: **This shader can be useful for mod, model, and texture pack developers. It supports various modes that display Wireframe, Normal Maps, Depth, PBR, Position, etc. in a single shader, and they all have labels.** When I first started working with shaders, I didn't quite understand how these modes looked visually during debugging. Therefore, I hope to help beginners assemble a convenient ready-made shader in one place.

### Wireframe Demo: ![Wireframe Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6iApq3jH/images/eeb81e16c831fd282718cbe79a8481bb19cd497d.webp) ### Normal Maps Demo: ![Normal Maps Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6iApq3jH/images/934225186882464725d9a24c10e4265e3e885627.webp)
